description: A faithful Codex pet version of the McWOLF mechanical wolf: tall top hat, extra-long snout with black round nose, half-lidded sly eyes, backward wing-like ears, cream and charcoal horizontal striped metal body, thin limbs, glove-like hands, and round shoes.

idle.notes: Calm in-place baseline with tiny blink, tiny hat bob, and sly half-lidded expression preserved.

walk.notes: True directional stroll rows for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Small thoughtful lean and chin-touch gestures without breaking Mack's relaxed mechanical-wolf identity.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased and smug gesture row, intentionally mapped to the waving atlas slot.

sleep.notes: Standing doze with drooped lids and slight sleepy nod.

point.notes: Spare atlas row repurposed as Mack's upward pointing finger gesture.

stroll.notes: Spare atlas row used for a relaxed theatrical saunter variant.

lamp_pose.notes: Spare atlas row repurposed as a prop-free lean inspired by the reference sheet's lamp-post attitude.

drag.notes: Directional drag intentionally reuses the true left and right walk rows.

point.notes: Optional feature action stored in the spare jumping atlas row.

stroll.notes: Optional feature action stored in the spare running atlas row.

lamp-pose.notes: Optional feature action stored in the spare failed atlas row as a relaxed lean.

smug.notes: Smug attitude is split across the happy row and the lamp-pose lean row because the fixed 8x9 atlas leaves no separate dedicated smug row.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: walk_left is a true left-facing strip, not an unchecked mirror
walk_right is a true right-facing strip
left drag uses the left-facing walk row
right drag uses the right-facing walk row
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
snout, hat, ears, stripes, hands, legs, and round shoes stay directionally unified in both walk rows
